hook: Mature dating often means tolerating the moment when you stop over-functioning and wait to see what is really there.
body: Pulling back from one-sided labor can feel risky because it exposes whether the connection has its own life.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

hook: Some men keep everything moving because they are afraid the truth will be visible if they stop.
body: Letting the dynamic show itself is not passivity. It is data collection with self-respect.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

hook: Letting the dynamic show itself is not passivity. It is data collection with self-respect.
body: If the conversation dies every time you stop reviving it, that may be painful but it is still useful information.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

body: Remove one form of over-functioning and observe what happens without rushing to rescue it.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life
